heading: North Casino vs North Curl Curl — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between North Casino, New South Wales and North Curl Curl, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: North Curl Curl has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to North Casino (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is North Casino or North Curl Curl safer from flooding?
faq.answer: North Casino has a flood risk score of 55/100, while North Curl Curl scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: North Casino scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. North Curl Curl scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in North Casino or North Curl Curl?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. North Curl Curl has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
